◆  ROLE SUMMARY
──────────────────────────────────────────────
You will own the product roadmap for our business intelligence and reporting platforms, working closely with internal stakeholders, including engineering squads, design partners, and business analysts. As a Product Manager at Arvind Limited GCC, you will drive business outcomes by delivering data-driven insights to key decision-makers, leveraging your expertise in data modelling, Power BI, and stakeholder reporting. Your primary focus will be on enhancing our reporting capabilities, improving data quality, and ensuring seamless integration with our existing tech stack. You will represent the product team in cross-functional forums, collaborating with various stakeholders to align product vision with business objectives.

◆  KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Deliver product roadmaps and requirements for our BI and reporting platforms, ensuring alignment with business objectives and stakeholder needs.
•  Own the development and maintenance of data models, leveraging DAX, Power Query (M), and star schema to drive data-driven insights.
•  Build and maintain relationships with stakeholders, including business analysts, engineering teams, and design partners, to ensure effective communication and collaboration.
•  Coordinate with the engineering team to prioritize and deliver product features, ensuring timely and high-quality releases.
•  Represent the product team in stakeholder reviews, providing updates on product progress, and gathering feedback to inform future product decisions.
•  Hire, onboard, and develop team members, setting clear goals, running performance reviews, and coaching direct reports to ensure their growth and success.
•  Balance hands-on product delivery with people management, allocating time and resources effectively to drive team performance and product outcomes.

◆  MUST-HAVE SKILLS
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  DAX — creating calculated columns, measures, and tables to drive data analysis and insights.
•  Power Query (M) — data transformation, data cleansing, and data loading for reporting purposes.
•  Data modelling / star schema — designing and implementing data models to support business intelligence and reporting.
•  Power BI Service & Gateway — publishing, managing, and maintaining reports, dashboards, and data sets.
•  SQL (query-only) — writing efficient SQL queries to extract and analyze data from various sources.
•  Stakeholder reporting — creating and delivering reports to key stakeholders, including business leaders and decision-makers.

◆  GOOD TO HAVE
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Experience with data visualization tools, such as Tableau or QlikView, to enhance reporting capabilities.
•  Knowledge of agile methodologies, such as Scrum or Kanban, to inform product development and delivery.
•  Familiarity with cloud-based data platforms, such as Azure or AWS, to support data integration and analytics.
•  Certification in product management, such as CSPO or PMI, to demonstrate expertise and commitment to the field.

◆  WHAT WE OFFER
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  The opportunity to work with a cutting-edge technology stack, including Power BI, Azure, and SQL, to drive business outcomes and growth.
•  A collaborative and dynamic work environment, with cross-functional teams and stakeholders, to foster learning and development.
•  A clear path for professional growth and development, with opportunities for training, mentoring, and career advancement.
•  Exposure to complex business problems and the chance to make a significant impact on the organization, driving data-driven decision-making and insights.

preferred_skills: Data visualization tools (e.g. Tableau or QlikView)
Cloud-based data platforms (e.g. Azure or AWS)
Certification in product management (e.g. CSPO or PMI)

◆  ROLE SUMMARY
──────────────────────────────────────────────
As a Data Analyst at Arvind Limited GCC, you will own the development and maintenance of data models, reports, and dashboards that drive business decisions. You will work closely with internal teams, such as business stakeholders and IT, to identify data requirements and deliver insights that inform strategic initiatives. Your work will have a direct impact on the business, enabling data-driven decision-making and process optimization. You will be an integral part of the Tech team, collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive business outcomes.

◆  KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Deliver high-quality data models, reports, and dashboards using Python, R, and ML algorithms to drive business insights and decision-making.
•  Build and deploy machine learning models using scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch to solve complex business problems.
•  Own the design, development, and maintenance of databases and data pipelines using Pandas, NumPy, and SQL to ensure data quality and integrity.
•  Coordinate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver data insights that meet their needs.
•  Improve data analysis and reporting processes by identifying areas for optimization and implementing new tools and methodologies.
•  Review and refine junior team members' work to ensure quality and consistency.
•  Develop and maintain technical documentation of data models, reports, and dashboards to ensure knowledge sharing and continuity.

◆  MUST-HAVE SKILLS
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Python (pandas, NumPy) — data wrangling, feature engineering, EDA, and data visualization.
•  R — statistical modeling, data analysis, and data visualization.
•  Statistical modelling — hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, and regression analysis.
•  ML algorithms — supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, and deep learning.
•  Model deployment — deploying models to production environments using tools such as Docker.
•  Pandas / NumPy — data manipulation, analysis, and visualization.

◆  GOOD TO HAVE
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or D3.js.
•  Knowledge of cloud-based data platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.
•  Familiarity with agile development methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban.
•  Certification in data science or a related field, such as Certified Data Scientist (CDS) or Certified Analytics Professional (CAP).

◆  WHAT WE OFFER
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  The opportunity to work on complex business problems and develop data-driven solutions that drive real business value.
•  Access to cutting-edge technologies and tools, including Python, R, ML algorithms, and cloud-based data platforms.
•  Collaborative and dynamic work environment with a team of experienced data analysts and scientists.
•  Opportunities for learning and development, including training and certification programs, to help you advance your career in data analytics.

◆  ROLE SUMMARY
──────────────────────────────────────────────
You will work as a BI analyst in the Tech department at Arvind Limited GCC, focusing on driving business outcomes through data-driven insights. You will own the development and maintenance of Power BI reports, working closely with internal stakeholders to understand their reporting requirements and delivering actionable analytics solutions. Your work will support business decision-making across various functions, including finance, supply chain, and operations, leveraging our data warehouse environment. You will be responsible for ensuring that stakeholders have access to accurate and timely data to inform their decisions.

◆  KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Deliver high-quality Power BI reports and dashboards, using DAX, Power Query, and data modelling techniques to meet stakeholder requirements
•  Own the development and maintenance of data models, ensuring data integrity and adherence to star schema principles
•  Build and deploy reports to the Power BI Service, configuring gateways for data refresh and security
•  Coordinate with stakeholders to understand their reporting needs, translating requirements into technical specifications
•  Improve existing reports and dashboards, incorporating feedback from stakeholders and identifying opportunities for process automation
•  Review and provide feedback on junior team members' work, ensuring adherence to best practices and standards
•  Collaborate with the data engineering team to optimize data warehouse queries and improve report performance
•  Develop and maintain documentation of report specifications, data sources, and technical configurations

◆  MUST-HAVE SKILLS
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Power BI — building enterprise dashboards, DAX measures, and row-level security
•  DAX — creating calculated columns, measures, and tables for data analysis
•  Power Query (M) — data transformation, filtering, and loading data into Power BI models
•  Data modelling / star schema — designing and implementing data models for reporting and analysis
•  SQL (query-only) — writing efficient queries to extract data from the data warehouse
•  Power BI Service & Gateway — deploying and configuring reports, managing data refresh and security
•  Stakeholder reporting — creating and delivering reports to meet business stakeholder needs

◆  GOOD TO HAVE
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Experience with data visualization tools, such as Tableau or Looker
•  Knowledge of data warehouse design principles and data governance
•  Familiarity with agile development methodologies and version control systems, such as Git
•  Certification in Power BI or related technologies, such as Microsoft Certified: Data Analyst Associate
•  Experience with data storytelling and presenting insights to non-technical stakeholders

◆  WHAT WE OFFER
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  The opportunity to work with a cutting-edge technology stack, including Power BI, data warehouse, and cloud-based infrastructure
•  Exposure to complex business problems and the chance to drive meaningful impact through data-driven insights
•  Collaborative and dynamic work environment with opportunities for learning and development, including training and certification programs
•  Cross-functional exposure to various business functions, including finance, supply chain, and operations, providing a broad understanding of the organization and its operations

◆  ROLE SUMMARY
──────────────────────────────────────────────
You will own the quality management process for Arvind Limited's textile manufacturing operations, working closely with internal teams, external vendors, and business stakeholders to drive high-quality products that meet customer requirements. As a QA Manager, you will be responsible for managing inline and final inspection processes, conducting customer audits, and reporting quality KPIs to senior management. Your work will have a direct impact on the company's ability to deliver high-quality products to global buyers, ensuring compliance with international quality standards such as ISO 9001 and SA8000.

◆  KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Lead the implementation of quality management systems, including ISO 9001 and SA8000, to ensure compliance with international standards
•  Design and drive inline and final inspection processes using AQL sampling, ensuring that products meet customer requirements
•  Conduct root cause analysis using 8D and Ishikawa methods to identify and resolve quality issues
•  Manage customer audits, including preparation, execution, and follow-up, to ensure compliance with buyer requirements
•  Develop and report quality KPIs to senior management, including defect rates, inspection results, and customer satisfaction
•  Collaborate with production teams to identify and implement process improvements that enhance product quality
•  Mentor junior team members in quality management practices and procedures
•  Own the maintenance of quality records, including inspection results, audit reports, and certification documents

◆  MUST-HAVE SKILLS
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Quality management systems (ISO 9001 / SA8000) — implementation and maintenance
•  Inline & final inspection (AQL sampling) — design and execution
•  Root cause analysis (8D / Ishikawa) — identification and resolution of quality issues
•  Customer audit management — preparation, execution, and follow-up
•  Quality KPI reporting — development and presentation of quality metrics
•  AQL sampling — design and execution of sampling plans
•  ISO 9001 and SA8000 standards — knowledge and application

◆  GOOD TO HAVE
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Six Sigma Green Belt or Black Belt certification — application of lean principles to quality management
•  Experience with third-party lab accreditation (SGS, Bureau Veritas, Intertek) — management of external lab testing
•  Knowledge of chemical testing (RSL/MRSL) — application of chemical testing to quality management
•  Familiarity with Arvind QC standards for denim and woven fabrics — application of company-specific quality standards
•  Experience with QMS implementation (ISO 9001) — design and execution of quality management systems

◆  WHAT WE OFFER
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  The opportunity to work with a leading textile manufacturer, managing quality processes for global buyers
•  Exposure to a range of quality management systems, including ISO 9001 and SA8000
•  Collaboration with cross-functional teams, including production, supply chain, and sales
•  Opportunities for professional development and growth, including training and certification programs
•  A dynamic and challenging work environment that requires creative problem-solving and analytical thinking

You will own the development and maintenance of business intelligence solutions, working closely with internal stakeholders and the Tech team to drive data-driven decision-making across Arvind Limited's businesses. As a Software developer in the GCC, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy Power BI reports and dashboards that meet business requirements. •  Lead the development of Power BI reports and dashboards, leveraging DAX and Power Query (M) to create interactive and dynamic visualizations
•  Drive the implementation of data governance and security standards, ensuring row-level security and access control in Power BI
•  Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements and define report specifications, translating business needs into technical solutions
•  Mentor junior team members in best practices for data modeling, Power BI development, and data visualization
•  Own the maintenance and optimization of existing Power BI reports and dashboards, ensuring high performance and data freshness

──────────────────────────────────────────────

•  Power BI Service & Gateway — publishing, managing, and securing Power BI reports and dashboards
•  SQL (query-only) — writing efficient SQL queries for data extraction and analysis
•  Power BI — building enterprise dashboards, creating DAX measures, and implementing row-level security

As an ML Engineer at Arvind Limited GCC, you will own the development, deployment, and maintenance of machine learning models that drive business decisions and optimize processes. You will work closely with internal teams, such as data scientists, business stakeholders, and IT, to identify opportunities for ML adoption and deliver scalable solutions. You will be an integral part of the Tech team, collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive business outcomes.

As a DevOps Engineer at Arvind Limited GCC, you will own the design, implementation, and maintenance of our cloud-based infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines, working closely with our development teams to ensure seamless deployment and operation of our applications. You will collaborate with internal stakeholders, including developers, QA engineers, and business analysts, to drive business outcomes through reliable and efficient IT operations. Your primary focus will be on ensuring high uptime, scalability, and security of our cloud infrastructure, leveraging platforms like Azure, AWS, or GCP.

◆  KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Deliver and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, or Jenkins, ensuring automated testing, building, and deployment of applications.
•  Build and manage cloud infrastructure using IaC tools like Terraform or Ansible, focusing on scalability, security, and compliance.
•  Own and operate Docker and Kubernetes clusters, ensuring containerized applications are properly deployed, monitored, and scaled.
•  Coordinate with development teams to implement observability tools like Prometheus, Grafana, or ELK, providing insights into application performance and health.
•  Improve and automate deployment scripts, leveraging tools like Bash, Python, or PowerShell, to reduce manual errors and increase efficiency.
•  Review and refine the work of junior engineers, providing guidance on best practices and ensuring knowledge sharing across the team.
•  Partner with the security team to implement and maintain security controls, adhering to organizational policies and compliance requirements.

◆  MUST-HAVE SKILLS
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / Azure DevOps / Jenkins) — designing and implementing automated deployment workflows.
•  IaC (Terraform / Ansible) — building and managing cloud infrastructure as code.
•  Docker & Kubernetes — deploying, managing, and scaling containerized applications.

◆  ROLE SUMMARY
──────────────────────────────────────────────
You will own the payroll function at Arvind Limited's GCC, driving business outcomes through efficient payroll management and team leadership. You will work closely with internal teams, including HR, Finance, and IT, as well as external vendors and business stakeholders to ensure seamless payroll operations. As a Manager Payroll, you will be responsible for leading a team of 10 and driving payroll app consolidation initiatives. Your expertise will be crucial in shaping the payroll strategy and ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.

◆  KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Lead the payroll team in achieving high-quality delivery and meeting business objectives, setting team goals and conducting regular performance reviews to ensure alignment with organizational expectations.
•  Drive the payroll app consolidation initiative, working with cross-functional teams to design and implement a unified payroll platform that meets the organization's needs.
•  Manage the hiring, onboarding, and development of team members, ensuring that the team has the necessary skills and expertise to deliver high-quality payroll services.
•  Represent the payroll team in cross-functional forums and stakeholder reviews, providing expert guidance and advice on payroll-related matters.
•  Collaborate with IT to ensure seamless integration of payroll systems and applications, troubleshooting issues and identifying areas for improvement.
•  Develop and maintain relationships with external vendors and partners, negotiating contracts and ensuring that services meet organizational requirements.
•  Coach and mentor junior team members, providing guidance and support to help them develop their skills and expertise.
•  Analyze payroll data and metrics, identifying trends and areas for improvement and developing strategies to optimize payroll operations.

◆  MUST-HAVE SKILLS
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  ATS management (Naukri / LinkedIn Recruiter) — managing job postings, candidate sourcing, and applicant tracking.
•  JD writing & job posting — creating effective job descriptions and posting them on internal and external job boards.
•  Candidate screening & assessment — evaluating candidate resumes, conducting interviews, and assessing candidate fit.
•  Full-cycle recruiting — managing the entire recruitment process, from job posting to onboarding.
•  Stakeholder management — building and maintaining relationships with internal stakeholders, including hiring managers and team members.
•  Payroll software (e.g. ADP, Paychex) — managing payroll processing, tax compliance, and benefits administration.

◆  GOOD TO HAVE
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  Certification in payroll management (e.g. CPP, FPC) — demonstrating expertise in payroll regulations, compliance, and best practices.
•  Experience with payroll analytics and reporting tools (e.g. Tableau, Power BI) — analyzing payroll data and creating visualizations to inform business decisions.
•  Knowledge of Indian labour laws and regulations (e.g. Factories Act, Minimum Wages Act) — ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.
•  Familiarity with ITIL or Agile methodologies — applying IT service management or agile principles to payroll operations.

◆  WHAT WE OFFER
──────────────────────────────────────────────
•  The opportunity to lead a team of 10 and drive payroll app consolidation initiatives, shaping the future of payroll operations at Arvind Limited's GCC.
•  Exposure to a complex and dynamic business environment, with opportunities to develop expertise in payroll management, team leadership, and stakeholder management.
•  Access to cutting-edge technology and tools, including payroll software, ATS, and analytics platforms.
•  A comprehensive learning and development program, including training, mentoring, and coaching to support career growth and professional development.

Next Steps
